heading: Employee discipline
label: 274 Employee discipline
text: The Director of the Bureau of Citizenship and Immigration Services may, notwithstanding any other provision of law, impose disciplinary action, including termination of employment, pursuant to policies and procedures applicable to employees of the Federal Bureau of Investigation, on any employee of the Bureau of Citizenship and Immigration Services who willfully deceives Congress or agency leadership on any matter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date on which the transfer of functions specified under takes effect, see , set out as a note under .section 251 of this titlesection 455 of Pub. L. 107–296section 271 of this title
